name: document-driven-development
description: Turn a PRD into approved project documents, then gate single or orchestrated implementation on task and package locks.

interface.shortDescription: Plan documents dynamically, then gate implementation on them.
interface.longDescription: Starts from a PRD, discovers and approves a project-specific document graph, then enforces document hashes, task locks, package ownership, independent review, traceability, hooks, and CI for single or orchestrated development.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start from my PRD, approve the minimum document graph with me, and use one Main Orchestrator with package locks and cross-review when the implementation is complex.
